extension_policy: Future Mirror features must be added by registry entries without changing engine pipeline stages.

version_policy.backward_compatibility: ACTIVE v1 registry entries remain readable until explicitly DEPRECATED or REMOVED.
version_policy.deprecated_usage: WARNING; allowed only during deprecation window.
version_policy.removed_usage: REJECT; removed entries cannot be referenced.
version_policy.reserved_usage: HOLD; reserved entries cannot drive decisions.
